infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SecureOps needs your location to verify you are at the site before clocking in.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SecureOps uses your location to track attendance and patrol routes.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SecureOps needs camera access for photo check-ins and incident documentation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SecureOps may access photos for incident reports.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow SecureOps to use your location for attendance verification.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SecureOps to access your camera for photo check-ins.
